Fields.Name: Attacker - Character ID
Fields.Description: Throwing side character ID

Fields.Name: Defender - Character ID
Fields.Description: Recipient character ID

Fields.Name: Max Throw Distance
Fields.Description: Do not throw unless the distance is closer than this value [m]

Fields.Name: Height Angle Difference - Min
Fields.Description: If the angle difference (Y-axis) between the throwing side and the receiving side is not larger than this angle, it will not be thrown.

Fields.Name: Height Angle Difference - Max
Fields.Description: If the angle difference (Y-axis) between the throwing side and the receiving side is smaller than this angle, it will not be thrown.

Fields.Name: Upper Height Range
Fields.Description: Do not throw unless the relative distance of the Y axis from the throwing side to the receiving side is smaller than this value

Fields.Name: Lower Height Range
Fields.Description: Do not throw unless the relative distance of the Y axis from the throwing side to the receiving side is smaller than this value

Fields.Name: Angle Difference - To Defender
Fields.Description: The angle difference between the vector in front of you and the vector in the direction from you to the other party. If it is larger than this value, it will not be thrown

Fields.Name: Throw Type ID
Fields.Description: ID that identifies the type of throw (association with attack parameter)

Fields.Name: Attacker - Animation ID
Fields.Description: Set attack animation ID (linked to EzState)

Fields.Name: Defender - Animation ID
Fields.Description: Set damage animation ID (linked to EzState)

Fields.Name: Self Escape - HP
Fields.Description: Value that can withstand throwing through

Fields.Name: Self Escape - Cycle Time
Fields.Description: Cycle time for self-throwing [ms]

Fields.Name: Sphere Cast - Radius Rate Top
Fields.Description: Ratio of upper radius of sphere cast [80-> 0.8]

Fields.Name: Sphere Cast - Radius Rate Low
Fields.Description: Spherecast lower radius ratio [80-> 0.8]

Fields.Name: Operation Type
Fields.Description: Operation type

Fields.Name: Attack Enable State
Fields.Description: Please set the state type that can be thrown on the throwing side

Fields.Name: Throw Following Type
Fields.Description: How to follow the character possessed by Adsorbed Damipoli while throwing. * Follow-up period is controlled by TAE action

Fields.Name: Throw Type
Fields.Description: Type of throw

Fields.Name: Self Escape - Cycle Count
Fields.Description: Number of self-throwing cycles

Fields.Name: Character Throw - Dummy Poly Direction Type
Fields.Description: Direction of Damipoli possession character when throwing occurs

Fields.Name: Throw can Side Turn
Fields.Description: Does the throwing side turn?

Fields.Name: Skip Attacker Weapon Category Check
Fields.Description: Do you want to skip the attacker's weapon category check?

Fields.Name: Skip Sphere Cast
Fields.Description: Do you want to skip the sphere cast?

Fields.Name: Enable Correct Position for Throw Adjustment
Fields.Description: If it is set to , the location of the throwing position will be the position of the adsorption Damipoli that has returned to the positional relationship equivalent to the flat ground.

Fields.Name: Enable Throw Following Fall Assist
Fields.Description: Is the same treatment as the wall removal prevention applied to the fall prevention wall so that it does not fall from the step when the follow-up is released?

Fields.Name: Enable Throw Following Feedback
Fields.Description: Do you want to return the character with the Adsorbed Damipoli when it comes in contact with a hit or fall prevention wall so that it does not look like it will get stuck in the middle wall or fall from a step?

Fields.Name: Attacker - Absorb Dummy ID
Fields.Description: Where on the throwing side should the receiving side be attracted?

Fields.Name: Defender - Absorb Dummy ID
Fields.Description: Where on the receiving side should the throwing side be adsorbed?

Fields.Name: Backstab - Max Throw Distance
Fields.Description: Only throw at a distance closer than this value [m] Used for throwing at the start of the Backstab

Fields.Name: Backstab - Height Angle Difference - Min
Fields.Description: If the angle difference (Y-axis) between the throwing side and the receiving side is not larger than this angle, it will not be thrown. It is used for throwing at the start of the Backstab.

Fields.Name: Backstab - Height Angle Difference - Max
Fields.Description: The angle difference (Y-axis) between the throwing side and the receiving side must be smaller than this angle to throw. Used for throwing at the start of the Backstab.

Fields.Name: Backstab - Upper Height Range
Fields.Description: It will not be thrown unless the relative distance of the Y axis from the throwing side to the receiving side is smaller than this value. It is used for throwing at the start of the Backstab.

Fields.Name: Backstab - Lower Height Range
Fields.Description: It will not be thrown unless the relative distance of the Y axis from the throwing side to the receiving side is smaller than this value. It is used for throwing at the start of the Backstab.

Fields.Name: Backstab - Angle Difference - To Defender
Fields.Description: The angle difference between the vector in front of you and the vector in the direction from you to the other party. If it is larger than this value, it will not be thrown. It will be used for throwing at the start of the Backstab.

Fields.Name: Attacker - Throwing Range Judgment - Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Damipoli that the thrower considers to be his position when calculating the throw range. If -1, the capsule origin

Fields.Name: Defender - Throwing Range Judgment - Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Damipoli that the thrower considers to be his position when calculating the throw range. If -1, the capsule origin

Fields.Name: Absorb Model Position Interpolation Time
Fields.Description: After the capsule is adsorbed on Damipoli, the time it takes for the character model to interpolate and move to the position according to the throwing animation data (when 0 is set, the model position is not interpolated and playback starts immediately after adsorption with the positional relationship according to the animation data. Will be)

Fields.Name: Throw Following End Easing Time
Fields.Description: Model position interpolation time at the end of tracking
